title: Contract PM – Aerostructures Modifications (Bristol, Outside IR35)
description_raw: Matchtech are advertising a contract Project Manager opportunity at a leading aerospace manufacturer in Bristol (Filton). 12-month engagement, outside IR35, starting 3 August 2026. The role oversees mechanical and structural modifications to an aerostructures programme. APM PMQ or Prince2 required. £650/day. AS9100 quality standard applies.
